mechanism_narrative: Rising real personal consumption expenditures drive corporate earnings growth, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no positive correlation with RSAFS growth rates over a 3-year rolling window (Rank IC < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day forward returns remain positive or neutral in >50% of instances where UNRATE jumps >0.2pp within a month.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production growth outpaces housing starts growth, supply-side efficiency gains dominate demand constraints, boosting corporate margins and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction term (INDPRO growth minus HOUST growth) shows no predictive power for 60-day forward returns (p-value > 0.10 in multivariate regression).

mechanism_narrative: In a tightening monetary cycle, rising federal funds rates increase discount rates faster than earnings can adjust, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are not significantly lower during FEDFUNDS hiking periods compared to flat or cutting periods (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth exceeding 3.0 percent annualized rate signals robust aggregate demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as earnings revisions accelerate.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day forward returns do not exhibit a statistically significant positive mean when GDPC1 quarterly growth exceeds 3.0% (confidence interval includes zero).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in the unemployment rate and stable federal funds rates indicate a healthy labor market without monetary headwinds, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint condition of falling UNRATE and flat FEDFUNDS fails to generate positive alpha relative to a buy-and-hold benchmark over a 2-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in the industrial production index reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and operational efficiency, which directly supports equity valuations and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns show no positive correlation with INDPRO month-over-month growth rates across multiple market cycles.

mechanism_narrative: When the CPI index rises above 2.5 percent year-over-year, inflation expectations become unanchored, prompting rate hike fears that compress equity multiples and generate negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day forward returns remain positive or neutral in >50% of instances where CPIAUCSL YoY exceeds 2.5%.
